title: QUEENLINK Magnetic Whiteboard, Large White Board 50 X 70 cm for Home Office Schedule Wall Mounted Aluminum Frame Dry Erase Board with Pen Tray
features: [New Generation Design] -- Premium sliver aluminum material with simpler and elegant frame bring a comfortable feel, enrich the texture of whiteboard while increasing writing area. Four smooth and durable plastic corners are used at the joints, enhanced firmness of white board.
[Dry Erase] -- Scratch resistant steel surface keep smooth writing experience and dry wipe easily with markers. The structure of galvanized sheet on the back stays excellent surface performance.

[Wall mounted & Stable] -- Easy to install, lightweight and flexible mounting wall whiteboard -- tightly attached to the wall, won't sway when writing. It will stay on the wall for a long time. Fixing kits and instruction included.

[Package Included]-- 2 Markers, 1 Eraser, 1 Pen Tray + Fixing knit. Markers built-in erases for using easily, movable pen tray provide convenient to place markers of erasers when writing on the white boards. Perfect for Office, Classroom, Home as a Reminder / Message / Notice / Planning board.

[Safe shipping & Packing] -- The whole whiteboard is covered with plastic, not just the surface which is easy to disassemble. Packed in strong carton avoid transportation damage. Contact us -- we will be responsible for shopping experience.
